output.console: Confirmation of file update with path and new size
output.file: Updated markdown file in vault directory with modified frontmatter and content

success_handling.criteria: Updated markdown file is written atomically (temp file + rename) and the resulting file is readable and valid

error_handling.criteria: Filesystem returns EACCES or EPERM when attempting to write the temp file or rename
error_handling.action: Abort edit, report permission error with the target path

decisions.condition: File written successfully via atomic write

decisions.decision: Atomic write (temp file + rename) to prevent corruption
decisions.rationale: Writing to a temporary file first and then renaming ensures the original file is not corrupted if the write is interrupted
